name: CRUD/conditional-patch
description: Conditional patch (PATCH /Patient?search-params with a FHIR Patch Parameters body) conformance tests: no matching resource returns 404, no search criteria is rejected with 412, exactly one match applies the patch, multiple matches are rejected with 412, and If-Match version preconditions are honored/rejected. Uses Patient fixtures tagged with unique identifiers (http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/cond-patch) to avoid collisions with other suites. Only the FHIR Patch (Parameters resource) form of conditional patch is covered: the engine's fixture bodies must deserialize as a JSON object (a FHIR resource), so the JSON Patch form (a raw '[{"op":...}]' array body) cannot be expressed as a static fixture and is skipped -- see the suite description for details.

variable.name: versionPatientId
variable.description: Server-assigned id of the Patient created in setup for the If-Match version tests (CP-VERSION)

variable.name: cpVersion
variable.description: versionId assigned after the round-trip update in setup bumps the CP-VERSION Patient to its second version

operation.description: Unconditionally create the Patient that the single-match patch test will update (CP-ONEMATCH)
Unconditionally create the first of two Patients sharing identifier CP-MULTI
Unconditionally create the second of two Patients sharing identifier CP-MULTI
Unconditionally create the Patient used for the If-Match version tests (CP-VERSION), initially at version 1
Read the CP-VERSION Patient back so it can be round-tripped through an update
Round-trip PUT the CP-VERSION Patient to bump it from version 1 to version 2

test.name: Conditional patch with no existing match returns 404
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/cond-patch|CP-NOMATCH with a FHIR Patch body. No resource carries that identifier, so the server must return 404 Not Found.

test.name: Conditional patch with no search criteria is rejected
test.description: PATCH /Patient with no query string at all. A conditional patch requires selective search criteria; with none, the server must reject the request. 412 Precondition Failed is the primary expectation; 400 Bad Request is accepted as a warningOnly alternative since the FHIR spec does not mandate a specific status for this case.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient with no query string

assert.description: Alternative: 400 Bad Request is also accepted

test.name: Conditional patch with exactly one match applies the patch
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/cond-patch|CP-ONEMATCH with a FHIR Patch body that replaces gender with 'female' and deletes address. Exactly one Patient carries that identifier (created in setup), so the server must apply the patch and return 200 OK with the updated content.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-ONEMATCH, matches the single seeded Patient

assert.description: Response body must be a Patient
gender must have been replaced with female

test.name: Conditional patch with multiple existing matches fails
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/cond-patch|CP-MULTI. Two Patients already carry that identifier (created in setup), so the criteria is not selective enough to identify a single resource; the server must return 412 Precondition Failed.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-MULTI, matches both seeded Patients

test.name: Conditional patch honors If-Match with the current version
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/cond-patch|CP-VERSION with header If-Match: W/"<current versionId>" (extracted from the round-trip update performed in setup). The version matches the resource's current state, so the server must apply the patch and return 200 OK.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-VERSION with If-Match matching the current versionId

test.name: Conditional patch with a mismatched If-Match version fails
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=http://ignixa.io/testscript/suite/cond-patch|CP-VERSION with header If-Match: W/"99" (a versionId that can never be current). The version precondition fails, so the server must return 412 Precondition Failed and must not apply the patch.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-VERSION with a deliberately wrong If-Match version
Teardown: conditional delete the CP-ONEMATCH Patient
Teardown: conditional delete both CP-MULTI Patients
Teardown: conditional delete the CP-VERSION Patient
